prompt:
A clean CSV-style temperature log export shown as a printed sheet with hourly timestamp blocks, compact table columns, and a small plotted temperature trend line, resting beside a simple thermistor logging rig and a laptop. The page should clearly represent a tangible export artifact from a sensor-logging system, emphasizing timestamps and repeated temperature samples without making any characters legible.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future instrumentation aesthetic: soft desk lighting, realistic paper, wire, and electronics textures, no logos, no readable labels, and no identifiable faces. Keep the exported sheet centered and uncluttered so it reads clearly as a DSPACE data artifact.
